system: AGM-158 JASSM Owned — Parachute & Ignition System
overview: The missile is dropped from the AC-130 in a cold, engine-off state. A separate parachute entity attaches above it and slows the descent. When the missile reaches a pre-calculated ignition altitude the parachute decouples, the engine fires, wings extend, and the missile climbs 600 units to its orbit altitude where it loiters and eventually dive-attacks.

phase_1_spawn.label: Spawn / Drop
phase_1_spawn.movetype: MOVETYPE_NONE — the engine does NOT apply gravity; velocity is 100% manual.
phase_1_spawn.engine_state: OFF. NWBool 'EngineOn' = false. No flame, no sound.

spawn_position.from_plane: Uses the plane's tail position at drop moment.
spawn_position.standalone: Calculated from OrbitAngle offset * OrbitRadius * 1.05 from CenterPos XY, Z = IgnitionAlt + 900 units.

altitude_calculation.ground: FindGround() raycasts straight down from CenterPos to find world floor Z.
altitude_calculation.IgnitionAlt: ground + SkyHeightAdd (default 2500) + random variance of ±25% of SkyHeightAdd.
altitude_calculation.note: The missile always spawns ABOVE IgnitionAlt (at IgnitionAlt + 900) so it has room to freefall before ignition triggers.

parachute_spawn.owner: Set to the missile entity via chute:SetOwner(self).
parachute_spawn.position: missile spawn position + Vector(0, 0, 105) — floats 105 units directly above.

phase_2_freefall.label: Freefall (parachute attached)

vertical_physics.model: Manual gravity + proportional drag giving true terminal velocity.
vertical_physics.gravity_constant: 600 u/s² (Source default), applied every tick as: velZ -= 600 * dt
vertical_physics.drag_formula: drag = k * |velZ|   where k = GRAVITY / FREEFALL_MAX_FALL = 600/320 ≈ 1.875
vertical_physics.terminal_velocity: 320 u/s downward — drag exactly cancels gravity at this speed.
vertical_physics.hard_clamp: velZ is clamped to -320 u/s as a floating-point safety net.

horizontal_physics.direction: FreefallHorizDir = CallDir (XY unit vector of AC-130 heading at drop).
horizontal_physics.speed_ramp: FreefallHorizSpeed starts at 0 and increases each tick: speed = min(speed + 380 * dt * 0.7, 380). Reaches full 380 u/s in approximately 1.4 seconds.
horizontal_physics.result: The missile glides diagonally — moving forward along the plane's heading while falling, simulating a realistic weapon release trajectory.

phase_2_freefall.position_integration: SetPos( x + horizDir.x*horizSpeed*dt,  y + horizDir.y*horizSpeed*dt,  z + velZ*dt ) every tick.

cosmetic_attitude.pitch: Lerps toward -25° proportional to fall speed fraction (0 at rest, -25° at terminal velocity).
cosmetic_attitude.yaw: Lerps toward glide direction angle so the nose tracks the horizontal motion.

parachute_behaviour.tracking: Every tick: chute SetPos = missile:GetPos() + (0,0,105). Yaw matches missile yaw.
parachute_behaviour.sway: Pitch oscillates ±2.5° at 1.2 rad/s via sin(SwayClock) for a natural hang.
parachute_behaviour.detach_trigger: Checks missile NWBool 'EngineOn' every tick. As soon as it is true, calls Detach().
parachute_behaviour.detach_condition: EngineOn becomes true the instant IgniteEngine() runs on the missile.

phase_3_ignition_trigger.label: Ignition Altitude Check
phase_3_ignition_trigger.checked_in: ENT:Think() on the missile, every freefall tick.
phase_3_ignition_trigger.snap: Missile Z is hard-snapped to exactly IgnitionAlt to prevent overshoot.
phase_3_ignition_trigger.calls: self:IgniteEngine() — executes immediately in the same tick.

phase_4_ignition.label: Engine Ignition (IgniteEngine)
steps_in_order: 3. PhysicsInit(SOLID_VPHYSICS) — switches from MOVETYPE_NONE to MOVETYPE_VPHYSICS.
5. PhysObj:Wake(); PhysObj:EnableGravity(false) — engine owns altitude, not gravity.
6. Seed initial velocity: forward * max(Speed, FreefallHorizSpeed), Z=0. This preserves the horizontal glide momentum from freefall — no jarring velocity reset.
7. Fire HelicopterMegaBomb effect at exhaust position (GetPos - GetForward*55).
phase_4_ignition.parachute_decoupling_side_effect: Setting NWBool 'EngineOn' = true causes the chute entity's next Think() tick (within 1/60 s) to call Detach(). The chute entity is replaced by a prop_physics clone that tumbles and drifts away with random velocity (±80 XY, -40 to +20 Z) and random angular velocity (±60°). The prop auto-removes after 12 seconds. A zipline_clip2.wav sound plays at decoupling.

phase_5_climb_to_orbit.label: Post-Ignition Climb (PhysicsUpdate)
phase_5_climb_to_orbit.driven_by: ENT:PhysicsUpdate() — runs every physics frame, only when EngineIgnited = true.

altitude_controller.liveAlt: AltDriftCurrent + jitter. AltDriftCurrent starts at OrbitAlt and lerps toward AltDriftTarget (picked every 10-25 s within ±700 units of OrbitAlt).
altitude_controller.climb_behaviour: On ignition the missile is at IgnitionAlt. liveAlt ≈ OrbitAlt = IgnitionAlt + 600. altError = 600 → vel.z = min(600*8, 120) = 120 u/s upward immediately. As the missile rises, altError shrinks and vel.z proportionally reduces. The missile asymptotically approaches OrbitAlt with no overshoot.
altitude_controller.max_descent_rate: 120 u/s downward (for altitude corrections during loiter).

horizontal_orbit.orbit_speed: 420 u/s base * rand(0.85, 1.15) — resolves to ~357–483 u/s.
horizontal_orbit.orbit_direction: Random CW or CCW per missile.
horizontal_orbit.orbit_angle_update: OrbitAngle += OrbitAngSpeed * dt every physics frame.
horizontal_orbit.position_correction: If posErr > 20 u, adds posErr:GetNormalized() * 80 to vel to keep the missile on the circle.
horizontal_orbit.center_wander: BaseCenterPos drifts sinusoidally ±60–160 units in XY at slow rates (0.003–0.010 rad/frame) to prevent a perfectly fixed circle.

attitude_during_climb.yaw: Tracks tangent of orbit circle with a soft correction of ±0.6°/frame.
attitude_during_climb.roll: Banks into turns: proportional to yaw delta * -25, clamped ±30°, smoothed.
attitude_during_climb.pitch: Based on forward speed ratio * 10°, clamped ±15°, smoothed.

phase_6_loiter_to_dive.label: Loiter → WeaponWindow → Dive
phase_6_loiter_to_dive.dive_telegraph: 1-second build-up where nose pitches toward -60° before committing. If no alive player is found, the dive is cancelled and a new window begins.
phase_6_loiter_to_dive.on_commit: Locks nearest alive player, applies random aim offset ±400 XY, switches collision to COLLISION_GROUP_NONE, sets SOLID_VPHYSICS, then UpdateDive() takes over at 2200 u/s (ramping from 55% = 1210 u/s).
